catalog_import.record_policy: header-only until every production field is approved
catalog_import.current_importer_boundary: Catalog importer rejects blank or non-numeric size, price, weight, and occupied length; live variants require all four values to be greater than zero. It also validates display_scale and compatible_bead_sizes, plus stock, orientation mode, allowed-orientation, allowed-position, and neighbor-constraint inputs. Catalog importer, database schema, REST response, quote payload, and order snapshot persist approved decor orientation. Directional fields remain empty for non-decor variants and cannot replace distinct physical left/right variant keys.

decor_orientation_review.record_policy: non-production review only; never import directly
rules: fixed_left and fixed_right are separate physical variants and must reference one another through mirrored_variant_key.
mirrorable and rotatable describe a single approved physical variant only when production confirms that its orientation can be changed without substituting a distinct part.
Any chosen orientation must be preserved in future design sequence, official recipe, quote, cart snapshot, order snapshot, and production summary before it can be made sellable.

legacy_mapping.record_policy: review-only; all rows must remain production_import_eligible=no until approval
